name: EVOFEM BIOSCIENC.DL-,0001
summary: Evofem Biosciences, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company committed to developing and commercializing innovative products to address unmet needs in women's sexual and reproductive health. The company's lead product is Phexxi, a non-hormonal contraceptive vaginal gel. Evofem Biosciences is headquartered in San Diego, California.
